output: Completed batch 2 tasks T2-T3. Added full-match existing-shot lookup for timeline and gallery selections, threaded those shots through both context-menu implementations, rendered existing shot actions above the create/generate controls with created-shot deduplication, updated the affected tests, and checkpointed the batch result to `.megaplan/plans/enhance-the-video-editor-20260406-0259/execution_batch_2.json`.
deviations: The four implementation files were already dirty before this batch from unrelated in-progress work. I applied only the batch-scoped menu changes and preserved the existing edits.
I updated the directly affected test files during this batch so the full modules could be verified with the new existing-shot behavior and with T1's earlier gallery selection-persistence change.

Advisory audit finding: Sense check SC4 is missing an executor acknowledgment.

task_updates.executor_notes: Added `existingShotsForSelection` in `TimelineEditor.tsx` using `every()` over `selectionShotCreationState.generationIds`, passed it into `ClipAction`, added `existingShots?: Shot[]` to both `ClipActionProps` and `ClipContextMenuProps`, snapshotted `existingShots` in `shotActionsSnapshotRef`, and rendered existing shot actions above the create/generate controls with created-shot dedup in `ClipAction.tsx`. Verification: `npx vitest run src/tools/video-editor/components/TimelineEditor/` passed, including the new `ClipAction` coverage for existing-shot rendering and snapshot persistence.

Added `existingShots?: Shot[]` to `SelectionContextMenuProps`, rendered existing shots at the top of the shared menu with created-shot dedup and a section separator, computed gallery `existingShotsForSelection` from `gallerySelectionMap.values().generationId` with full-match `every()` semantics, and passed those shots into `SelectionContextMenu`. Updated the gallery and shared menu tests to cover the new wiring and the earlier non-clearing gallery behavior. Verification: `npx vitest run src/shared/components/SelectionContextMenu.test.tsx` and `npx vitest run src/features/gallery/components/GenerationsPane/components/GenerationsPaneGallery.test.tsx` both passed.

sense_check_acknowledgments.executor_note: Yes. `TimelineEditor.tsx` now computes `existingShotsForSelection` with `selectionShotCreationState.generationIds.every(...)` and the dependency array is `[shots, selectionShotCreationState.generationIds]`. `existingShots` was added to both `ClipActionProps` and `ClipContextMenuProps`, and `ClipAction.tsx` snapshots it inside `shotActionsSnapshotRef` at menu-open time before passing the snapshotted list into `ClipContextMenu`.

Yes. `GenerationsPaneGallery.tsx` derives selected generation ids from `gallerySelectionMap.values()` and maps `.generationId`, not from `selectedGalleryIds`, then filters shots with `every()` for full matches. `SelectionContextMenuProps` now includes `existingShots?: Shot[]`, and the shared menu renders existing shots above the lower action section while filtering out `createdShot?.id` so the inline created shot is not duplicated.
